creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jhale
Date: Sat Oct  6 04:35:33 2012
New Revision: 305334
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/305334

Log:
  - Update to 1.0.12
  
  While here:
  - Convert Makefile header to new style
  
  PR:		ports/172346
  Submitted by:	Radim Kolar <hsn@sendmail.cz> (maintainer)
  Approved by:	makc (mentor)

Modified:
  head/databases/cassandra/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/cassandra/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/cassandra/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/databases/cassandra/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/cassandra/Makefile	Sat Oct  6 04:27:07 2012	(r305333)
+++ head/databases/cassandra/Makefile	Sat Oct  6 04:35:33 2012	(r305334)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	cassandra
-# Date created:		2009-08-06
-# Whom:			Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>
-#
+# Created by: Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	cassandra
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.11
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.12
 CATEGORIES=	databases java
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_APACHE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	cassandra/${PORTVERSION}
